Home.title: Open-source company site with static front office and dynamic admin
Home.subtitle: OpenWebsite combines Next.js, SQLite and Prisma for multilingual content, article management, contact intake, ISR publishing and one-command Docker deployment.
Home.productsSubtitle: SEO pages, content operations, lead intake and deployment are designed as one operating loop.
Home.whySubtitle: It is a website system you can operate, not only a homepage template.

About.title: About OpenWebsite
About.subtitle: An open-source starting point for company websites that balances search visibility, content operations and low-cost deployment.
About.body: The default architecture combines a static public site with a dynamic admin. Public pages serve SEO-friendly HTML through ISR, and content changes trigger targeted revalidation.
About.missionBody: Give companies a maintainable, deployable and extensible multilingual website foundation.

Services.title: Products / Services
Services.subtitle: OpenWebsite ships the default modules needed to present a company, operate content, capture leads and deploy reliably.

Articles.title: Articles & News
Articles.subtitle: Filter company news, industry knowledge and project stories by category.

Contact.title: Contact us
Contact.subtitle: Submissions are saved in the admin. If SMTP is configured, the administrator also receives an email notification.
Contact.name: Name
